steps.title: Connect belief to action
steps.content: The first sentence explains Rowan's view that Elvis Presley's music should be understood as an anthology of many musical influences. The next sentence describes Rowan naming a course after that idea.

steps.title: Choose the purpose transition
steps.content: The course title serves Rowan's purpose of presenting Elvis's music as an anthology. B would make the title a summary, C would make it a restatement, and D would make it merely another unrelated fact. The answer is A.
